description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-rating

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-rating/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Star color (filled/empty/hover), size, gap. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Slider-like pattern. aria-valuenow/min/max. aria-label. Keyboard (arrow keys). Read-only mode.
3. **Functionality** — Max stars. Half-star precision. Read-only. Hover preview. Form integration. Clear/reset.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts (star). Half-star rendering. Hover state.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Selection. Half-stars. Keyboard. Read-only. Form.
8. **Storybook** — Interactive. Read-only. Half-stars. Sizes. Custom icon.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Fivestar module. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-rating
